152. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nMinimal test to verify Django's connection lifecycle management.\nTests that CONN_MAX_AGE=None persistent connections stay alive.\n\"\"\"\nimport os\nimport sys\nimport time\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\n# Configure Django settings\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', '__test_settings__')\n\nimport types\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__test_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': None,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-secret-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = ['django.contrib.contenttypes', 'django.contrib.auth']\nsys.modules['__test_settings__'] = test_settings\n\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection\n\ndef test_persistent_connection_stays_alive():\n    \"\"\"Test that CONN_MAX_AGE=None connections are not closed by close_if_unusable_or_obsolete.\"\"\"\n    # Close any existing connection\n    connection.close()\n\n    # Patch CONN_MAX_AGE=None, CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS=True\n    with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n        **connection.settings_dict,\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': None,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': True,\n    }):\n        # Run a query to establish connection\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        print(f\"close_at = {connection.close_at}\")\n        print(f\"connection is not None: {connection.connection is not None}\")\n\n        # Simulate request_finished\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n\n        print(f\"After close_if_unusable_or_obsolete:\")\n        print(f\"  connection is same: {connection.connection is old_connection}\")\n        print(f\"  connection is None: {connection.connection is None}\")\n\n        if connection.connection is old_connection:\n            print(\"PASS: Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) stayed alive!\")\n        else:\n            print(\"FAIL: Persistent connection was closed prematurely!\")\n\ndef test_conn_max_age_0_closes():\n    \"\"\"Test that CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connections ARE closed.\"\"\"\n    connection.close()\n\n    with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n        **connection.settings_dict,\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n    }):\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n        print(f\"CONN_MAX_AGE=0: close_at = {connection.close_at}\")\n\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n\n        if connection.connection is None:\n            print(\"PASS: CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connection was closed!\")\n        else:\n            print(\"FAIL: CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connection should have been closed!\")\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    print(\"=== Testing connection lifecycle ===\\n\")\n    test_persistent_connection_stays_alive()\n    print()\n    test_conn_max_age_0_closes()\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_connection_lifecycle.py"
}
Output
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nMinimal test to verify Django's connection lifecycle management.\nTests that CONN_MAX_AGE=None persistent connections stay alive.\n\"\"\"\nimport os\nimport sys\nimport time\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\n# Configure Django settings\nos.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', '__test_settings__')\n\nimport types\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__test_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': None,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-secret-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = ['django.contrib.contenttypes', 'django.contrib.auth']\nsys.modules['__test_settings__'] = test_settings\n\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection\n\ndef test_persistent_connection_stays_alive():\n    \"\"\"Test that CONN_MAX_AGE=None connections are not closed by close_if_unusable_or_obsolete.\"\"\"\n    # Close any existing connection\n    connection.close()\n\n    # Patch CONN_MAX_AGE=None, CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS=True\n    with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n        **connection.settings_dict,\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': None,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': True,\n    }):\n        # Run a query to establish connection\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        print(f\"close_at = {connection.close_at}\")\n        print(f\"connection is not None: {connection.connection is not None}\")\n\n        # Simulate request_finished\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n\n        print(f\"After close_if_unusable_or_obsolete:\")\n        print(f\"  connection is same: {connection.connection is old_connection}\")\n        print(f\"  connection is None: {connection.connection is None}\")\n\n        if connection.connection is old_connection:\n            print(\"PASS: Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) stayed alive!\")\n        else:\n            print(\"FAIL: Persistent connection was closed prematurely!\")\n\ndef test_conn_max_age_0_closes():\n    \"\"\"Test that CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connections ARE closed.\"\"\"\n    connection.close()\n\n    with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n        **connection.settings_dict,\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n    }):\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n        print(f\"CONN_MAX_AGE=0: close_at = {connection.close_at}\")\n\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n\n        if connection.connection is None:\n            print(\"PASS: CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connection was closed!\")\n        else:\n            print(\"FAIL: CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connection should have been closed!\")\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    print(\"=== Testing connection lifecycle ===\\n\")\n    test_persistent_connection_stays_alive()\n    print()\n    test_conn_max_age_0_closes()\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/test_connection_lifecycle.py",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

{
  "command": "python3.11 test_connection_lifecycle.py",
  "description": "Run connection lifecycle test with installed Django 5.2.12"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "=== Testing connection lifecycle ===\n\nclose_at = None\nconnection is not None: True\nAfter close_if_unusable_or_obsolete:\n  connection is same: True\n  connection is None: False\nPASS: Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) stayed alive!\n\nCONN_MAX_AGE=0: close_at = None\nFAIL: CONN_MAX_AGE=0 connection should have been closed!"
}
154. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"Debug script to understand connection lifecycle behavior.\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, time, types\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__test_settings2__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__test_settings2__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': None,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__test_settings2__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n# Get the raw wrapper\ndef get_wrapper():\n    return connections['default']\n\ndef debug_state(label):\n    w = get_wrapper()\n    print(f\"  [{label}] connection={w.connection is not None}, close_at={w.close_at}, max_age={w.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE', 'NOT SET')}\")\n\nprint(\"=== Initial state ===\")\ndebug_state(\"initial\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=None ===\")\nconnection.close()\ndebug_state(\"after close\")\n\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': None, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    debug_state(\"inside patch (before query)\")\n    # Force connection\n    connection.ensure_connection()\n    debug_state(\"after ensure_connection\")\n\n    connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n    debug_state(\"after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete\")\n\n    if connection.connection is None:\n        print(\"  FAIL: Connection closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=None!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"  PASS: Connection persisted with CONN_MAX_AGE=None\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=0 ===\")\nconnection.close()\ndebug_state(\"after close\")\n\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    debug_state(\"inside patch (before connect)\")\n    connection.ensure_connection()\n    debug_state(\"after ensure_connection\")\n\n    connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n    debug_state(\"after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete\")\n\n    if connection.connection is None:\n        print(\"  PASS: Connection closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=0!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"  FAIL: Connection NOT closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 ===\")\nconnection.close()\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 30, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    connection.ensure_connection()\n    debug_state(\"after ensure_connection\")\n\n    connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n    debug_state(\"after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete\")\n\n    if connection.connection is None:\n        print(\"  FAIL: Connection closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 (shouldn't be yet)!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"  PASS: Connection persisted with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 (within time window)\")\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_debug.py"
}
Output
{
  "content": "\"\"\"Debug script to understand connection lifecycle behavior.\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, time, types\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__test_settings2__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__test_settings2__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n        'CONN_MAX_AGE': None,\n        'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__test_settings2__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n# Get the raw wrapper\ndef get_wrapper():\n    return connections['default']\n\ndef debug_state(label):\n    w = get_wrapper()\n    print(f\"  [{label}] connection={w.connection is not None}, close_at={w.close_at}, max_age={w.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE', 'NOT SET')}\")\n\nprint(\"=== Initial state ===\")\ndebug_state(\"initial\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=None ===\")\nconnection.close()\ndebug_state(\"after close\")\n\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': None, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    debug_state(\"inside patch (before query)\")\n    # Force connection\n    connection.ensure_connection()\n    debug_state(\"after ensure_connection\")\n\n    connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n    debug_state(\"after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete\")\n\n    if connection.connection is None:\n        print(\"  FAIL: Connection closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=None!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"  PASS: Connection persisted with CONN_MAX_AGE=None\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=0 ===\")\nconnection.close()\ndebug_state(\"after close\")\n\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    debug_state(\"inside patch (before connect)\")\n    connection.ensure_connection()\n    debug_state(\"after ensure_connection\")\n\n    connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n    debug_state(\"after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete\")\n\n    if connection.connection is None:\n        print(\"  PASS: Connection closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=0!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"  FAIL: Connection NOT closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 ===\")\nconnection.close()\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 30, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    connection.ensure_connection()\n    debug_state(\"after ensure_connection\")\n\n    connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n    debug_state(\"after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete\")\n\n    if connection.connection is None:\n        print(\"  FAIL: Connection closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 (shouldn't be yet)!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"  PASS: Connection persisted with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 (within time window)\")\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/test_debug.py",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "=== Initial state ===\n  [initial] connection=False, close_at=None, max_age=None\n\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=None ===\n  [after close] connection=False, close_at=None, max_age=None\n  [inside patch (before query)] connection=False, close_at=None, max_age=None\n  [after ensure_connection] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=None\n  [after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=None\n  PASS: Connection persisted with CONN_MAX_AGE=None\n\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=0 ===\n  [after close] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=None\n  [inside patch (before connect)] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=0\n  [after ensure_connection] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=0\n  [after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=0\n  FAIL: Connection NOT closed with CONN_MAX_AGE=0\n\n=== Test with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 ===\n  [after ensure_connection] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=30\n  [after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete] connection=True, close_at=None, max_age=30\n  PASS: Connection persisted with CONN_MAX_AGE=30 (within time window)"
}

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"236:     @async_unsafe\\n237:     def connect(self):\\n238:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Connect to the database. Assume that the connection is closed.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n239:         # Check for invalid configurations.\\n240:         self.check_settings()\\n241:         # In case the previous connection was closed while in an atomic block\\n242:         self.in_atomic_block = False\\n243:         self.savepoint_ids = []\\n244:         self.atomic_blocks = []\\n245:         self.needs_rollback = False\\n246:         # Reset parameters defining when to close/health-check the connection.\\n247:         self.health_check_enabled = self.settings_dict[\\\"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\\\"]\\n248:         max_age = self.settings_dict[\\\"CONN_MAX_AGE\\\"]\\n249:         self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.monotonic() + max_age\\n250:         self.closed_in_transaction = False\\n251:         self.errors_occurred = False\\n252:         # New connections are healthy.\\n253:         self.health_check_done = True\\n254:         # Establish the connection\\n255:         conn_params = self.get_connection_params()\\n256:         self.connection = self.get_new_connection(conn_params)\\n257:         self.set_autocommit(self.settings_dict[\\\"AUTOCOMMIT\\\"])\\n258:         self.init_connection_state()\\n259:         connection_created.send(sender=self.__class__, connection=self)\\n260: \\n261:         self.run_on_commit = []\\n262: \\n263: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c@674eda1c03a3187905f48afee0f15226aa62fdf3/-/blob/django/db/backends/base/base.py%3FL236-262\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "236:     @async_unsafe\n237:     def connect(self):\n238:         \"\"\"Connect to the database. Assume that the connection is closed.\"\"\"\n239:         # Check for invalid configurations.\n240:         self.check_settings()\n241:         # In case the previous connection was closed while in an atomic block\n242:         self.in_atomic_block = False\n243:         self.savepoint_ids = []\n244:         self.atomic_blocks = []\n245:         self.needs_rollback = False\n246:         # Reset parameters defining when to close/health-check the connection.\n247:         self.health_check_enabled = self.settings_dict[\"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\"]\n248:         max_age = self.settings_dict[\"CONN_MAX_AGE\"]\n249:         self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.monotonic() + max_age\n250:         self.closed_in_transaction = False\n251:         self.errors_occurred = False\n252:         # New connections are healthy.\n253:         self.health_check_done = True\n254:         # Establish the connection\n255:         conn_params = self.get_connection_params()\n256:         self.connection = self.get_new_connection(conn_params)\n257:         self.set_autocommit(self.settings_dict[\"AUTOCOMMIT\"])\n258:         self.init_connection_state()\n259:         connection_created.send(sender=self.__class__, connection=self)\n260: \n261:         self.run_on_commit = []\n262: \n263: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c@674eda1c03a3187905f48afee0f15226aa62fdf3/-/blob/django/db/backends/base/base.py%3FL236-262"
  }
}

        "message": "Used time.monotonic() instead of time.time() where applicable.\n\ntime.monotonic() available from Python 3.3:\r\n\r\n- Nicely communicates a narrow intent of \"get a local system monotonic\r\n  clock time\" instead of possible \"get a not necessarily accurate Unix\r\n  time stamp because it needs to be communicated to outside of this\r\n  process/machine\" when time.time() is used.\r\n  \r\n- Its result isn't affected by the system clock updates.\r\n\r\nThere are two classes of time.time() uses changed to time.monotonic()\r\nby this change:\r\n\r\n- measuring time taken to run some code.\r\n\r\n- setting and checking a \"close_at\" threshold for for persistent db\r\n  connections (django/db/backends/base/base.py).",
        "repository": "github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c",
        "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c/-/commit/af5ec222ccd24e81f9fec6c34836a4e503e7ccf7"

        "diffHunk": "django/db/backends/__init__.py django/db/backends/__init__.py\n@@ -89,0 +94,3 @@ class BaseDatabaseWrapper(object):\n+        max_age = self.settings_dict['CONN_MAX_AGE']\n+        self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.time() + max_age\n+        self.errors_occurred = False\n@@ -95,3 +116,0 @@ class BaseDatabaseWrapper(object):\n-                max_age = self.settings_dict['CONN_MAX_AGE']\n-                self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.time() + max_age\n-                self.errors_occurred = False\n",
        "matchRanges": [
          {
            "endCharacter": 22,
            "endLine": 3,
            "startCharacter": 14,
            "startLine": 3
          },
          {
            "endCharacter": 30,
            "endLine": 7,
            "startCharacter": 22,
            "startLine": 7
          }
        ],
        "message": "Added BaseDatabaseWrapper.ensure_connection.\n\nThis API is useful because autocommit cannot be managed without an open\nconnection.",
        "repository": "github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c",
        "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c/-/commit/1617557ae30001cef8a863687d4bcdc28151cd50"
      },
      {
        "authorName": "Aymeric Augustin",
        "commit": "2ee21d9f0d9eaed0494f3b9cd4b5bc9beffffae5",
        "diffHunk": "django/db/backends/__init__.py django/db/backends/__init__.py\n@@ -52,0 +53,3 @@ class BaseDatabaseWrapper(object):\n+        # Connection termination related attributes\n+        self.close_at = None\n+        self.errors_occurred = False\n@@ -79,0 +85,3 @@ class BaseDatabaseWrapper(object):\n+                max_age = self.settings_dict['CONN_MAX_AGE']\n+                self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.time() + max_age\n+                self.errors_occurred = False\n@@ -354,0 +371,3 @@ class BaseDatabaseWrapper(object):\n+                    return\n+            if self.close_at is not None and time.time() >= self.close_at:\n+                self.close()\n",
        "matchRanges": [
          {
            "endCharacter": 22,
            "endLine": 3,

Input
{
  "command": "sed -n '246,252p' /home/claude/.local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/db/backends/base/base.py",
  "description": "Check exact connect() code in installed Django"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "        # Reset parameters defining when to close/health-check the connection.\n        self.health_check_enabled = self.settings_dict[\"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\"]\n        max_age = self.settings_dict[\"CONN_MAX_AGE\"]\n        self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.monotonic() + max_age\n        self.closed_in_transaction = False\n        self.errors_occurred = False\n        # New connections are healthy."
}

{
  "command": "sed -n '608,618p' /home/claude/.local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/django/db/backends/base/base.py",
  "description": "Check exact close_if_unusable_or_obsolete() close_at logic in installed Django"
}

{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "                    self.errors_occurred = False\n                    self.health_check_done = True\n                else:\n                    self.close()\n                    return\n\n            if self.close_at is not None and time.monotonic() >= self.close_at:\n                self.close()\n                return\n\n    # ##### Thread safety handling #####"
}

167. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "python3.11 -c \"\nimport sys, time\nsys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')\n\n# Simulate what close_if_unusable_or_obsolete does for CONN_MAX_AGE=None\nclass FakeConn:\n    pass\n\nclass FakeWrapper:\n    def __init__(self, max_age):\n        self.connection = FakeConn()\n        self.settings_dict = {'CONN_MAX_AGE': max_age, 'AUTOCOMMIT': True}\n        self.errors_occurred = False\n        max_age_val = max_age\n        self.close_at = None if max_age_val is None else time.monotonic() + max_age_val\n        self.autocommit = True\n        self._closed = False\n    \n    def get_autocommit(self):\n        return self.autocommit\n    \n    def close(self):\n        self.connection = None\n        self._closed = True\n    \n    def close_if_unusable_or_obsolete(self):\n        if self.connection is not None:\n            if self.get_autocommit() != self.settings_dict['AUTOCOMMIT']:\n                self.close()\n                return\n            if self.errors_occurred:\n                self.close()\n                return\n            if self.close_at is not None and time.monotonic() >= self.close_at:\n                self.close()\n                return\n\n# Test CONN_MAX_AGE=None\nw = FakeWrapper(None)\nprint(f'CONN_MAX_AGE=None: close_at={w.close_at}')\nw.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\nprint(f'  After close: connection={w.connection is not None} (expected True)')\n\n# Test CONN_MAX_AGE=0\nw2 = FakeWrapper(0)\nprint(f'CONN_MAX_AGE=0: close_at={w2.close_at}')\nw2.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\nprint(f'  After close: connection={w2.connection is not None} (expected False)')\n\n# Simulate the BUG: close_at = time.monotonic() + (max_age or 0)\ndef buggy_close_at(max_age):\n    return time.monotonic() + (max_age or 0)\n\nw3 = FakeWrapper(None)\nw3.close_at = buggy_close_at(None)  # Bug: sets close_at = time.monotonic() instead of None\nprint(f'BUGGY CONN_MAX_AGE=None: close_at={w3.close_at}')\nw3.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\nprint(f'  After close: connection={w3.connection is not None} (expected True but got {w3.connection is not None})')\n\"\n",
  "description": "Simulate connection lifecycle logic with and without bug"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "CONN_MAX_AGE=None: close_at=None\n  After close: connection=True (expected True)\nCONN_MAX_AGE=0: close_at=20246512.044903666\n  After close: connection=False (expected False)\nBUGGY CONN_MAX_AGE=None: close_at=20246512.044920325\n  After close: connection=False (expected True but got False)"
}

175. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_deepsearch @ -
Input
{
  "question": "In the github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c repository, what is the exact code in django/db/backends/base/base.py for the connect() method and close_if_unusable_or_obsolete() method? Is there any bug related to CONN_MAX_AGE=None persistent connections being closed prematurely? What is the exact value of close_at when max_age is None?"
}

specifies whether it's allowed for the function to fail.\\n102:         self.run_on_commit = []\\n103: \\n104:         # Should we run the on-commit hooks the next time set_autocommit(True)\\n105:         # robust=False):\\n728:         if not callable(func):\\n729:             raise TypeError(\\\"on_commit()'s callback must be a callable.\\\")\\n730:         if self.in_atomic_block:\\n731:             #       raise TransactionManagementError(\\n735:                 \\\"on_commit() cannot be used in manual transaction management\\\"\\n736:             )\\n737:         else:\\n738:             # No transaction in progress and in autocommit mode; execute\\n739:             # immediately.\\n740:             if robust:\\n741:                 try:\\n742:                     func()\\n743: When a datetime is\\n140:         read from the database, it is always returned in this time zone.\\n141: \\n142:         When the database backend supports time zones, it doesn't matter which\\n143:         time zone Django uses, as long as aware datetimes are used everywhere.\\n144:         Other users connecting to the database can choose their own time zone.\\n145: \\n146:         When the database backend doesn't support time zones, the time zone\\n147:         Django uses may be constrained by the requirements of other users of\\n148:         the database.\\n149: BaseDatabaseWrapper may require a get_database_version() \\\"\\n187:             \\\"method.\\\"\\n188:         )\\n189: \\n190:     def check_database_version_supported(self):\\n191:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n192:         Raise an error if the database version isn't supported by this\\n193:         version of Django.\\n194:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n195:         if (\\n196:             self.features.minimum_database_version is not None\\n197:             and self.get_database_version() < self.features.minimum_database_version\\n198:         ):\\n199:             db_version = \\\".\\\".join(map(str, self.get_database_version()))\\n200:             min_db_version = \\\".\\\".join(map(str, self.features.minimum_database_version))\\n201:             raise    # ##### Backend-specific methods for creating connections and cursors #####\\n207: \\n208:     def get_connection_params(self):\\n209:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Return a dict of parameters suitable for NotImplementedError(\\n218:             \\\"subclasses of BaseDatabaseWrapper may require a get_new_connection() \\\"\\n219:             \\\"method\\\"\\n220:         )\\n221: \\n222:     def init_connection_state(self):\\n223:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Initialize the database connection settings.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n224:         if self.alias not in RAN_DB_VERSION_CHECK:\\n225:             self.check_database_version_supported()\\n226:             RAN_DB_VERSION_CHECK.add(self.alias)\\n227: \\n228:     def create_cursor(self, name=None):\\n229:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Create a cursor. Assume that a connection is established.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n230:         raise NotImplementedError(\\n231:             \\\"subclasses of BaseDatabaseWrapper may require a create_cursor() method\\\"\\n232:         )\\n233: \\n234:     # ##### Backend-specific methods for creating connections #####\\n235: \\n236:     @async_unsafe\\n237:     def connect(self):\\n238:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Connect to the database. Assume that the connection is closed.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n239:         # Check for invalid configurations.\\n240:         self.check_settings()\\n241:         # In case the previous connection was closed while in an atomic block\\n242:         self.in_atomic_block = False\\n243:         self.savepoint_ids = []\\n244:         self.atomic_blocks = []\\n245:         self.needs_rollback = False\\n246:         # Reset parameters defining when to close/health-check the connection.\\n247:         self.health_check_enabled = self.settings_dict[\\\"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\\\"]\\n248:         max_age = self.settings_dict[\\\"CONN_MAX_AGE\\\"]\\n249:         self.close_at = None if max_age is None else time.monotonic() + max_age\\n250:         self.closed_in_transaction = False\\n251:         self.errors_occurred = False\\n252:         # New connections are healthy.\\n253:         self.health_check_done = True\\n254:         # Establish the connection\\n255:         conn_params = self.get_connection_params()\\n256:         self.connection = self.get_new_connection(conn_params)\\n257:         self.set_autocommit(self.settings_dict[\\\"AUTOCOMMIT\\\"])\\n258:         self.init_connection_state()\\n259:         connection_created.send(sender=self.__class__, connection=self)\\n260: \\n261:         self.run_on_commit = []\\n262: \\n263:     def check_settings(self):\\n264:         if self.settings_dict[\\\"TIME_ZONE\\\"] is not None and not settings.USE_TZ:\\n265:             raise ImproperlyConfigured(\\n266:                 \\\"Connection '%s' cannot set TIME_ZONE because USE_TZ is False.\\\"\\n267:                 % self.alias\\n268:             )\\n269: \\n270:     @async_unsafe\\n271:     def ensure_connection(self):\\n272:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Guarantee that a connection to the database is established.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n273:         if self.connection is None:\\n274:             if self.in_atomic_block and self.closed_in_transaction:\\n275:                 raise ProgrammingError(\\n276:                     \\\"Cannot open a new connection in an atomic block.\\\"\\n277:                 )\\n278:             with self.wrap_database_errors:\\n279:                 self.connect()\\n280: \\n281:     # ##### Backend-specific wrappers for PEP-249 connection methods #####\\n282: \\n283:     def _prepare_cursor(self, cursor):\\n284:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n285:         Validate the connection is usable and perform database cursor wrapping.\\n286:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n287:         self.validate_thread_sharing()\\n288:         if self.queries_logged:\\n289:             wrapped_cursor = self.make_debug_cursor(cursor)\\n290:         else:\\n291:             wrapped_cursor = self.make_cursor(cursor)\\n292:         return wrapped_cursor\\n293: \\n294:     def _cursor(self, name=None):\\n295:         self.close_if_health_check_failed()\\n296:         self.ensure_connection()\\n297:         with self.wrap_database_errors:\\n298:             return self._prepare_cursor(self.create_cursor(name))\\n299: \\n300:     def _commit(self):\\n301:         if self.connection is not None:\\n302:             with debug_transaction(self, \\\"COMMIT\\\"), self.wrap_database_errors:\\n303:                 return self.connection.commit()\\n304: \\n305:     def _rollback(self):\\n306:         if self.connection is not None:\\n307:             with debug_transaction(self, \\\"ROLLBACK\\\"), self.wrap_database_errors:\\n308:                 return self.connection.rollback()\\n309: \\n310:     def _close(self):\\n311:         if self.connection is not None:\\n312:             with self.wrap_database_errors:\\n313:                 return self.connection.close()\\n314: \\n315:     # 191. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nStandalone test that mirrors ConnectionHealthChecksTests from Django's test suite.\nTests that CONN_MAX_AGE=None persistent connections work correctly.\n\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time, unittest\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock\n\n# Set up Django settings\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__health_test_settings__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__health_test_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-secret-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__health_test_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n\nclass ConnectionHealthChecksTests(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def setUp(self):\n        # All test cases need newly configured and created connections.\n        connection.close()\n\n    def tearDown(self):\n        connection.close()\n\n    def patch_settings_dict(self, conn_health_checks):\n        self.settings_dict_patcher = patch.dict(\n            connection.settings_dict,\n            {\n                **connection.settings_dict,\n                \"CONN_MAX_AGE\": None,\n                \"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\": conn_health_checks,\n            },\n        )\n        self.settings_dict_patcher.start()\n        self.addCleanup(self.settings_dict_patcher.stop)\n\n    def run_query(self):\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_enabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None connections should not be closed by close_if_unusable_or_obsolete.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=True)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        # Newly created connections are considered healthy without performing health check.\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        # Simulate request_finished.\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n        # CONN_MAX_AGE=None: connection should NOT be closed\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                      f\"FAIL: persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) was closed! \"\n                      f\"close_at={connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_disabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None with health checks disabled: connection should persist.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        # Newly created connections are considered healthy without performing health check.\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        # Simulate request_finished.\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n        # Persistent connections are enabled (connection is not closed).\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                      f\"FAIL: persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) was closed! \"\n                      f\"close_at={connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_none_for_persistent_connections(self):\n        \"\"\"When CONN_MAX_AGE=None, close_at must be None after connecting.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.run_query()  # establish connection\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.close_at,\n                          f\"FAIL: close_at should be None for CONN_MAX_AGE=None, \"\n                          f\"but got {connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_set_for_timed_connections(self):\n        \"\"\"When CONN_MAX_AGE=30, close_at must be set to a future time.\"\"\"\n        connection.close()\n        with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n            **connection.settings_dict,\n            'CONN_MAX_AGE': 30,\n            'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n        }):\n            self.run_query()  # establish connection\n            self.assertIsNotNone(connection.close_at,\n                                  \"FAIL: close_at should be set for CONN_MAX_AGE=30\")\n            self.assertGreater(connection.close_at, time.monotonic(),\n                               \"FAIL: close_at should be in the future for CONN_MAX_AGE=30\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_set_for_conn_max_age_0(self):\n        \"\"\"When CONN_MAX_AGE=0, close_at must be set (approximately now).\"\"\"\n        connection.close()\n        with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n            **connection.settings_dict,\n            'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0,\n            'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n        }):\n            self.run_query()  # establish connection\n            self.assertIsNotNone(connection.close_at,\n                                  \"FAIL: close_at should be set for CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    print(\"=== Running ConnectionHealthChecksTests ===\\n\")\n    loader = unittest.TestLoader()\n    suite = loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(ConnectionHealthChecksTests)\n    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)\n    result = runner.run(suite)\n    sys.exit(0 if result.wasSuccessful() else 1)\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_connection_health.py"
}
Output
{
  "content": "\"\"\"\nStandalone test that mirrors ConnectionHealthChecksTests from Django's test suite.\nTests that CONN_MAX_AGE=None persistent connections work correctly.\n\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time, unittest\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock\n\n# Set up Django settings\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__health_test_settings__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__health_test_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-secret-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__health_test_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n\nclass ConnectionHealthChecksTests(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def setUp(self):\n        # All test cases need newly configured and created connections.\n        connection.close()\n\n    def tearDown(self):\n        connection.close()\n\n    def patch_settings_dict(self, conn_health_checks):\n        self.settings_dict_patcher = patch.dict(\n            connection.settings_dict,\n            {\n                **connection.settings_dict,\n                \"CONN_MAX_AGE\": None,\n                \"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\": conn_health_checks,\n            },\n        )\n        self.settings_dict_patcher.start()\n        self.addCleanup(self.settings_dict_patcher.stop)\n\n    def run_query(self):\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_enabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None connections should not be closed by close_if_unusable_or_obsolete.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=True)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        # Newly created connections are considered healthy without performing health check.\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        # Simulate request_finished.\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n        # CONN_MAX_AGE=None: connection should NOT be closed\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                      f\"FAIL: persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) was closed! \"\n                      f\"close_at={connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_disabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None with health checks disabled: connection should persist.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        # Newly created connections are considered healthy without performing health check.\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        # Simulate request_finished.\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n        # Persistent connections are enabled (connection is not closed).\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                      f\"FAIL: persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) was closed! \"\n                      f\"close_at={connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_none_for_persistent_connections(self):\n        \"\"\"When CONN_MAX_AGE=None, close_at must be None after connecting.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.run_query()  # establish connection\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.close_at,\n                          f\"FAIL: close_at should be None for CONN_MAX_AGE=None, \"\n                          f\"but got {connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_set_for_timed_connections(self):\n        \"\"\"When CONN_MAX_AGE=30, close_at must be set to a future time.\"\"\"\n        connection.close()\n        with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n            **connection.settings_dict,\n            'CONN_MAX_AGE': 30,\n            'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n        }):\n            self.run_query()  # establish connection\n            self.assertIsNotNone(connection.close_at,\n                                  \"FAIL: close_at should be set for CONN_MAX_AGE=30\")\n            self.assertGreater(connection.close_at, time.monotonic(),\n                               \"FAIL: close_at should be in the future for CONN_MAX_AGE=30\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_set_for_conn_max_age_0(self):\n        \"\"\"When CONN_MAX_AGE=0, close_at must be set (approximately now).\"\"\"\n        connection.close()\n        with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {\n            **connection.settings_dict,\n            'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0,\n            'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False,\n        }):\n            self.run_query()  # establish connection\n            self.assertIsNotNone(connection.close_at,\n                                  \"FAIL: close_at should be set for CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    print(\"=== Running ConnectionHealthChecksTests ===\\n\")\n    loader = unittest.TestLoader()\n    suite = loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(ConnectionHealthChecksTests)\n    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)\n    result = runner.run(suite)\n    sys.exit(0 if result.wasSuccessful() else 1)\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/test_connection_health.py",

  "type": "create"

{
  "content": "\"\"\"Debug why close() is not setting connection=None.\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__close_debug_settings__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__close_debug_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__close_debug_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\ndef state(label):\n    w = connections['default']\n    print(f\"  [{label}]\")\n    print(f\"    connection={w.connection is not None}\")\n    print(f\"    close_at={w.close_at}\")\n    print(f\"    in_atomic_block={w.in_atomic_block}\")\n    print(f\"    closed_in_transaction={w.closed_in_transaction}\")\n    print(f\"    autocommit={w.autocommit}\")\n    print(f\"    CONN_MAX_AGE={w.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE')}\")\n\nprint(\"=== Initial state ===\")\nstate(\"initial\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Step 1: Establish connection with CONN_MAX_AGE=None ===\")\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': None, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n    state(\"after run_query with CONN_MAX_AGE=None\")\n\nstate(\"after patch.dict exit (CONN_MAX_AGE reverted)\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Step 2: Close connection ===\")\n# Check close() conditions\nw = connections['default']\nprint(f\"  Before close(): connection={w.connection is not None}\")\nprint(f\"  in_atomic_block={w.in_atomic_block}\")\nprint(f\"  closed_in_transaction={w.closed_in_transaction}\")\nconnection.close()\nstate(\"after close()\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Step 3: Establish new connection with CONN_MAX_AGE=0 ===\")\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    state(\"before run_query (inside patch)\")\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n    state(\"after run_query with CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_close_debug.py"
}

{
  "content": "\"\"\"Debug why close() is not setting connection=None.\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__close_debug_settings__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__close_debug_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__close_debug_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\ndef state(label):\n    w = connections['default']\n    print(f\"  [{label}]\")\n    print(f\"    connection={w.connection is not None}\")\n    print(f\"    close_at={w.close_at}\")\n    print(f\"    in_atomic_block={w.in_atomic_block}\")\n    print(f\"    closed_in_transaction={w.closed_in_transaction}\")\n    print(f\"    autocommit={w.autocommit}\")\n    print(f\"    CONN_MAX_AGE={w.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE')}\")\n\nprint(\"=== Initial state ===\")\nstate(\"initial\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Step 1: Establish connection with CONN_MAX_AGE=None ===\")\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': None, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n    state(\"after run_query with CONN_MAX_AGE=None\")\n\nstate(\"after patch.dict exit (CONN_MAX_AGE reverted)\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Step 2: Close connection ===\")\n# Check close() conditions\nw = connections['default']\nprint(f\"  Before close(): connection={w.connection is not None}\")\nprint(f\"  in_atomic_block={w.in_atomic_block}\")\nprint(f\"  closed_in_transaction={w.closed_in_transaction}\")\nconnection.close()\nstate(\"after close()\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Step 3: Establish new connection with CONN_MAX_AGE=0 ===\")\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    state(\"before run_query (inside patch)\")\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n    state(\"after run_query with CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n",

  "stdout": "=== Initial state ===\n  [initial]\n    connection=False\n    close_at=None\n    in_atomic_block=False\n    closed_in_transaction=False\n    autocommit=False\n    CONN_MAX_AGE=0\n\n=== Step 1: Establish connection with CONN_MAX_AGE=None ===\n  [after run_query with CONN_MAX_AGE=None]\n    connection=True\n    close_at=None\n    in_atomic_block=False\n    closed_in_transaction=False\n    autocommit=True\n    CONN_MAX_AGE=None\n  [after patch.dict exit (CONN_MAX_AGE reverted)]\n    connection=True\n    close_at=None\n    in_atomic_block=False\n    closed_in_transaction=False\n    autocommit=True\n    CONN_MAX_AGE=0\n\n=== Step 2: Close connection ===\n  Before close(): connection=True\n  in_atomic_block=False\n  closed_in_transaction=False\n  [after close()]\n    connection=True\n    close_at=None\n    in_atomic_block=False\n    closed_in_transaction=False\n    autocommit=True\n    CONN_MAX_AGE=0\n\n=== Step 3: Establish new connection with CONN_MAX_AGE=0 ===\n  [before run_query (inside patch)]\n    connection=True\n    close_at=None\n    in_atomic_block=False\n    closed_in_transaction=False\n    autocommit=True\n    CONN_MAX_AGE=0\n  [after run_query with CONN_MAX_AGE=0]\n    connection=True\n    close_at=None\n    in_atomic_block=False\n    closed_in_transaction=False\n    autocommit=True\n    CONN_MAX_AGE=0"

{
  "command": "python3.11 -c \"\nfrom django.utils.asyncio import async_unsafe\nimport inspect\nprint(inspect.getsource(async_unsafe))\n\"",
  "description": "Check what async_unsafe decorator does"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "def async_unsafe(message):\n    \"\"\"\n    Decorator to mark functions as async-unsafe. Someone trying to access\n    the function while in an async context will get an error message.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def decorator(func):\n        @wraps(func)\n        def inner(*args, **kwargs):\n            # Detect a running event loop in this thread.\n            try:\n                get_running_loop()\n            except RuntimeError:\n                pass\n            else:\n                if not os.environ.get(\"DJANGO_ALLOW_ASYNC_UNSAFE\"):\n                    raise SynchronousOnlyOperation(message)\n            # Pass onward.\n            return func(*args, **kwargs)\n\n        return inner\n\n    # If the message is actually a function, then be a no-arguments decorator.\n    if callable(message):\n        func = message\n        message = (\n            \"You cannot call this from an async context - use a thread or \"\n            \"sync_to_async.\"\n        )\n        return decorator(func)\n    else:\n        return decorator"
}
196. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"Trace the close() execution in detail.\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__trace_settings__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__trace_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__trace_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n# Patch close() to add tracing\nimport django.db.backends.base.base as base_module\n\noriginal_close = base_module.BaseDatabaseWrapper.close\n\ndef traced_close(self):\n    print(f\"  close() called:\")\n    print(f\"    self.connection = {self.connection}\")\n    print(f\"    self.in_atomic_block = {self.in_atomic_block}\")\n    print(f\"    self.closed_in_transaction = {self.closed_in_transaction}\")\n    original_close(self)\n    print(f\"    After close: self.connection = {self.connection}\")\n\nbase_module.BaseDatabaseWrapper.close = traced_close\n\n# Establish connection\nprint(\"=== Establish connection ===\")\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': None, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n    print(f\"Connection established: {connection.connection is not None}\")\n    print(f\"  CONN_MAX_AGE: {connection.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE')}\")\n\nprint(f\"\\nAfter patch.dict exit:\")\nprint(f\"  CONN_MAX_AGE: {connection.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE')}\")\nprint(f\"  connection: {connection.connection is not None}\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Call close() ===\")\nconnection.close()\nprint(f\"After close(): connection is None = {connection.connection is None}\")\nprint(f\"  connection object: {connection.connection}\")\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_close_trace.py"
}
Output
{
  "content": "\"\"\"Trace the close() execution in detail.\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__trace_settings__'\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__trace_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': ':memory:',\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__trace_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n# Patch close() to add tracing\nimport django.db.backends.base.base as base_module\n\noriginal_close = base_module.BaseDatabaseWrapper.close\n\ndef traced_close(self):\n    print(f\"  close() called:\")\n    print(f\"    self.connection = {self.connection}\")\n    print(f\"    self.in_atomic_block = {self.in_atomic_block}\")\n    print(f\"    self.closed_in_transaction = {self.closed_in_transaction}\")\n    original_close(self)\n    print(f\"    After close: self.connection = {self.connection}\")\n\nbase_module.BaseDatabaseWrapper.close = traced_close\n\n# Establish connection\nprint(\"=== Establish connection ===\")\nwith patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': None, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n    with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n    print(f\"Connection established: {connection.connection is not None}\")\n    print(f\"  CONN_MAX_AGE: {connection.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE')}\")\n\nprint(f\"\\nAfter patch.dict exit:\")\nprint(f\"  CONN_MAX_AGE: {connection.settings_dict.get('CONN_MAX_AGE')}\")\nprint(f\"  connection: {connection.connection is not None}\")\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Call close() ===\")\nconnection.close()\nprint(f\"After close(): connection is None = {connection.connection is None}\")\nprint(f\"  connection object: {connection.connection}\")\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/test_close_trace.py",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

  "command": "python3.11 -c \"\nfrom django.db.backends.sqlite3.base import DatabaseWrapper\nimport inspect\n\n# Check if DatabaseWrapper has its own close() method\nprint('close in DatabaseWrapper.__dict__:', 'close' in DatabaseWrapper.__dict__)\nprint('close MRO:')\nfor cls in DatabaseWrapper.__mro__:\n    if 'close' in cls.__dict__:\n        print(f'  {cls.__name__}')\n        \n# Check actual close method\nprint()\nprint('DatabaseWrapper.close is:', DatabaseWrapper.close)\nprint('BaseDatabaseWrapper.close is:', DatabaseWrapper.__bases__[0].close if hasattr(DatabaseWrapper.__bases__[0], 'close') else 'N/A')\n\"",
  "description": "Check if SQLite DatabaseWrapper overrides close()"
}

  "stdout": "    @async_unsafe\n    def close(self):\n        self.validate_thread_sharing()\n        # If database is in memory, closing the connection destroys the\n        # database. To prevent accidental data loss, ignore close requests on\n        # an in-memory db.\n        if not self.is_in_memory_db():\n            BaseDatabaseWrapper.close(self)"
}

To prevent accidental data loss, ignore close requests on\\n225:         # an in-memory db.\\n226:         if not self.is_in_memory_db():\\n227:             BaseDatabaseWrapper.close(self)\\n228: \\n229:     def _savepoint_allowed(self):\\n230:         # When 'isolation_level' is not None, sqlite3 commits before each\\n231:         # savepoint; it's a bug. When it is None, savepoints don't make sense\\n232:         # because autocommit is enabled. The only exception is inside 'atomic'\\n233:         # blocks. To work around that bug, on SQLite, 'atomic' starts a\\n234:         # transaction explicitly rather than simply disable autocommit.\\n235:         return self.in_atomic_block\\n236: \\n237:     def _set_autocommit(self, autocommit):\\n238:         if autocommit:\\n239:             level = None\\n240:         else:\\n241: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/django--674eda1c@674eda1c03a3187905f48afee0f15226aa62fdf3/-/blob/django/db/backends/sqlite3/base.py%3FL218-240\"}",

To prevent accidental data loss, ignore close requests on\n225:         # an in-memory db.\n226:         if not self.is_in_memory_db():\n227:             BaseDatabaseWrapper.close(self)\n228: \n229:     def _savepoint_allowed(self):\n230:         # When 'isolation_level' is not None, sqlite3 commits before each\n231:         # savepoint; it's a bug. 203. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "\"\"\"Test connection lifecycle with file-based SQLite (not :memory:).\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time, unittest, tempfile\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__file_sqlite_settings__'\n\n# Use a temp file for SQLite\ndb_file = tempfile.mktemp(suffix='.sqlite3')\n\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__file_sqlite_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': db_file,\n        'TEST': {'NAME': db_file},\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__file_sqlite_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n\nclass ConnectionHealthChecksTests(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def setUp(self):\n        connection.close()\n\n    def tearDown(self):\n        connection.close()\n\n    def patch_settings_dict(self, conn_health_checks):\n        patcher = patch.dict(\n            connection.settings_dict,\n            {\n                **connection.settings_dict,\n                \"CONN_MAX_AGE\": None,\n                \"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\": conn_health_checks,\n            },\n        )\n        patcher.start()\n        self.addCleanup(patcher.stop)\n\n    def run_query(self):\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_enabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None connections should NOT be closed.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=True)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        # Newly created connections are healthy - is_usable should not be called\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        print(f\"\\n  close_at after connect: {connection.close_at}\")\n\n        # Simulate request_finished\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n\n        print(f\"  connection same after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete: \"\n              f\"{connection.connection is old_connection}\")\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                     f\"Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) should NOT be closed! \"\n                     f\"close_at was {old_connection}\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_disabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None with health checks disabled: connection should persist.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                     \"Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) should NOT be closed!\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_none_for_persistent(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None sets close_at=None.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.run_query()\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.close_at,\n                         f\"close_at must be None for CONN_MAX_AGE=None, got {connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_set_for_max_age_0(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=0 sets close_at to now.\"\"\"\n        with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n            self.run_query()\n            self.assertIsNotNone(connection.close_at,\n                                 \"close_at must be set for CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    try:\n        print(\"=== Testing with file-based SQLite ===\\n\")\n        loader = unittest.TestLoader()\n        suite = loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(ConnectionHealthChecksTests)\n        runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)\n        result = runner.run(suite)\n    finally:\n        # Cleanup\n        connection.close()\n        try:\n            os.unlink(db_file)\n        except:\n            pass\n    sys.exit(0 if result.wasSuccessful() else 1)\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/test_file_sqlite.py"
}
Output
{
  "content": "\"\"\"Test connection lifecycle with file-based SQLite (not :memory:).\"\"\"\nimport os, sys, types, time, unittest, tempfile\nimport django\nfrom unittest.mock import patch\n\nos.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE'] = '__file_sqlite_settings__'\n\n# Use a temp file for SQLite\ndb_file = tempfile.mktemp(suffix='.sqlite3')\n\ntest_settings = types.ModuleType('__file_sqlite_settings__')\ntest_settings.DATABASES = {\n    'default': {\n        'ENGINE': 'django.db.backends.sqlite3',\n        'NAME': db_file,\n        'TEST': {'NAME': db_file},\n    }\n}\ntest_settings.USE_TZ = True\ntest_settings.TIME_ZONE = 'UTC'\ntest_settings.SECRET_KEY = 'test-key'\ntest_settings.INSTALLED_APPS = []\nsys.modules['__file_sqlite_settings__'] = test_settings\ndjango.setup()\n\nfrom django.db import connection, connections\n\n\nclass ConnectionHealthChecksTests(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def setUp(self):\n        connection.close()\n\n    def tearDown(self):\n        connection.close()\n\n    def patch_settings_dict(self, conn_health_checks):\n        patcher = patch.dict(\n            connection.settings_dict,\n            {\n                **connection.settings_dict,\n                \"CONN_MAX_AGE\": None,\n                \"CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS\": conn_health_checks,\n            },\n        )\n        patcher.start()\n        self.addCleanup(patcher.stop)\n\n    def run_query(self):\n        with connection.cursor() as cursor:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT 42\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_enabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None connections should NOT be closed.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=True)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        # Newly created connections are healthy - is_usable should not be called\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        print(f\"\\n  close_at after connect: {connection.close_at}\")\n\n        # Simulate request_finished\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n\n        print(f\"  connection same after close_if_unusable_or_obsolete: \"\n              f\"{connection.connection is old_connection}\")\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                     f\"Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) should NOT be closed! \"\n                     f\"close_at was {old_connection}\")\n\n    def test_health_checks_disabled(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None with health checks disabled: connection should persist.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.connection)\n\n        with patch.object(connection, \"is_usable\", side_effect=AssertionError):\n            self.run_query()\n\n        old_connection = connection.connection\n        connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete()\n        self.assertIs(old_connection, connection.connection,\n                     \"Persistent connection (CONN_MAX_AGE=None) should NOT be closed!\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_none_for_persistent(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=None sets close_at=None.\"\"\"\n        self.patch_settings_dict(conn_health_checks=False)\n        self.run_query()\n        self.assertIsNone(connection.close_at,\n                         f\"close_at must be None for CONN_MAX_AGE=None, got {connection.close_at}\")\n\n    def test_close_at_is_set_for_max_age_0(self):\n        \"\"\"CONN_MAX_AGE=0 sets close_at to now.\"\"\"\n        with patch.dict(connection.settings_dict, {'CONN_MAX_AGE': 0, 'CONN_HEALTH_CHECKS': False}):\n            self.run_query()\n            self.assertIsNotNone(connection.close_at,\n                                 \"close_at must be set for CONN_MAX_AGE=0\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    try:\n        print(\"=== Testing with file-based SQLite ===\\n\")\n        loader = unittest.TestLoader()\n        suite = loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(ConnectionHealthChecksTests)\n        runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)\n        result = runner.run(suite)\n    finally:\n        # Cleanup\n        connection.close()\n        try:\n            os.unlink(db_file)\n        except:\n            pass\n    sys.exit(0 if result.wasSuccessful() else 1)\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/test_file_sqlite.py",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
